name: Penne with Sun-Dried Tomatoes and Capers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh or frozen peas (optional), thawed
salt and fresh-ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sun-dried tomatoes in a small bowl and cover with 1/2 cup boiling water. Set aside.
2. In a sauté pan, heat some broth over medium heat. Sauté onions for 3 minutes, covered.
3. Drain the sun-dried tomatoes, reserving their liquid, and add them to the onions.
4. Stir in garlic, capers, thyme, and tarragon.
5. Add chopped tomatoes, peas, and reserved tomato-soaking liquid. Cook, covered, until tomatoes soften and lose shape.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Toss hot cooked pasta with the sauce, stir in parsley, and top with grated parmesan cheese.
